context: The device the user purchased is unresponsive upon powering on, and they are feeling impatient.

empathic_chain.observation: The user frequently experiences tense confusion when using subordinate clauses.
empathic_chain.feeling: I sense their curiosity and a slight amount of confusion.
empathic_chain.need: The user needs objective, professional constructive feedback to improve engineering quality.
empathic_chain.request: Directly point out the risky lines of code and provide refactoring suggestions that include best practices.

output_format: Concept brief -> Core syntax -> Examples -> Practice suggestions
